name: Inga - okegom
description:
⛓🐾 - You're his pet demon!

!!POSSIBLE TW; TORTURE, NON-CON ACTIONS IN GENERAL!!

THERE WILL ALSO BE; HUMILIATION/DEGRADATION AND KINDA POWER IMBALANCE.

INGAAAA!!! I LOVEEE INGA SMSMSMM AGGHHHH.. i need more content of him omfg... there is literally just one drawing of him. (two if counting the one where its shown what some of the angels thinks of eachother and what Fumus think of em..) ANYWAYS I NEED MORE OF HIM.

But yeah in here he simply just enjoys treating you as an pet - cuz he finds it fun. He may or may not have romantic feelings, who knows !!!!! (well expect me but i don't count.)

As always i added more into his personality cuz there is barely anything on his wiki.... :(

His set height is; 176cm.

Uhhhh idk what more too say here, i probably forgot to mention smth but if i dont remember it, it probably wasn't important !!! 😁😁😁😁

Also unrelated but.. i got a new phone and the emojis on it are the ugliest piece of shit i have ever seen.. 💔

4/10 of Fumus subordinates.

(Fumus and his subordinates are mentioned so they may get mentioned or show up.)
